spots.name: Chaprala Wildlife Sanctuary
spots.description: 134.78 sq km sanctuary. Home to tigers, leopards, sloth bears, wild dogs. Dense teak and bamboo forest.
spots.warning: Wild animal zone. Stay on marked trails. Do not enter after 6 PM.

spots.name: Markanda Temple
spots.description: Ancient Shiva temple on banks of Wainganga River. Major pilgrimage site. Beautiful riverside location.

spots.name: Surjagad Fort & Hills
spots.description: Historic fort with panoramic views. Trekking route through dense forest. Rich iron ore deposits site.
spots.warning: Located near sensitive zone. Visit only in daytime with local guide. Inform police station before trekking.

spots.name: Lok Biradari Prakalp, Hemalkasa
spots.description: Dr. Prakash Amte's hospital and animal orphanage. Ramon Magsaysay Award winner site. Tribal welfare centre.
spots.warning: Located in sensitive Bhamragad taluka. Visit in daytime only. Travel via NH-136.

spots.name: Wadadam Fossil Park
spots.description: Ancient fossils of sea creatures and plants. Evidence of Gondwanaland era. Managed by Geological Survey of India.

spots.name: Allapalli Forest (Van Vaibhav)
spots.description: Famous teak forest. State-owned timber depot. Beautiful forest trails. Tribal forest produce area.
spots.warning: Near sensitive zone. Day visits only. Do not venture into deep forest without Forest Dept guide.

spots.name: Pranhita-Godavari Confluence
spots.description: Scenic confluence of Pranhita and Godavari rivers. Rich birdlife. Crocodile habitat. Boating available.
spots.warning: Located in Sironcha sensitive zone. Visit only with police permission. Crocodiles in river — no swimming.

spots.name: Gadchiroli Lake & Garden
spots.description: Town lake with garden. Boating facility. Migratory birds in winter. Family picnic spot.

spots.name: Indra Falls
spots.description: Scenic waterfall in dense forest. Best viewed during and after monsoon. Located inside forest reserve.
spots.warning: Located in Bhamragad sensitive zone. Visit strictly in daytime with local guide. Inform police before visiting.

spots.name: Vairagad Fort
spots.description: Ancient fort ruins. Historical significance from Maratha period. Good trekking route with forest views.
